cards.name: Starship Sensors
abilities: [keyword:Triggered Artifact] — The first time you play an [keyword:Artifact] each turn (including this one), you get +1[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Borrowed Nova Blaster
abilities: [keyword:Triggered Artifact] — The first time you play an [keyword:Artifact] each turn (including this one), you get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Give
abilities: You may discard an [keyword:Artifact] you control to get +1[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Take
abilities: [team:guardians-of-the-galaxy]: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's an [keyword:Artifact], draw it.

cards.name: Expandable Helmet
abilities: [keyword:Triggered Artifact] — The first time you play an [keyword:Artifact] each turn (including this one), draw a card.

cards.name: Don't Need that Stuff
abilities: You may discard an [keyword:Artifact] you control to get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Hadron Enforcer
abilities: [keyword:Triggered Artifact] — The first time you play an [keyword:Artifact] each turn (including this one), you get +3[icon:attack].

cards.name: Forgive
abilities: [hc:covert]: Draw a card.

cards.name: Resent
abilities: [hc:instinct]: You get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Sharpen Blades
abilities: If you control an [keyword:Artifact], draw a card.

cards.name: Resourceful Fugitive
abilities: To play this, you must put a card from your hand on the bottom of  your deck.
Draw two cards.

cards.name: Retractable Sword
abilities: [keyword:Triggered Artifact] — Whenever you draw a card during your turn, you get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Stolen Necroblaster
abilities: If you drew at least two cards this turn, you may KO a card from your hand or discard pile.

cards.name: Guardians Escape
abilities: If you drew at least two cards this turn, you get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Passion
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Violence]: Draw a card.

cards.name: Compassion
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Kindness]: Draw a card.

cards.name: Baby Groot
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Kindness]: Rescue a Bystander.

cards.name: Gravity Mines
abilities: [keyword:Triggered Artifact] — Whenever you use [keyword:Excessive Violence], draw a card.

cards.name: Don't Press this Button
abilities: [hc:ranged]: You get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Press the Button
abilities: [hc:tech]: You may KO a card from your hand or dicard pile.

cards.name: Tricky
abilities: If you have at least five different card names, you get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: We are Groot
abilities: Reveal your hand. You get +1[icon:attack] for each different card name in your hand.
(Each [rule:Divided Card] has two different card names.)

cards.name: Nothing Goes over my Head
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Violence]: Look at the top two cards of your deck. Discard any number of them and put the rest back in any order.

cards.name: Dual Knives
abilities: [keyword:Triggered Artifact] — Whenever you play another [hc:strength] or [hc:instinct] card, you get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: I am Invisible
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Violence]: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it's [hc:strength] or [hc:instinct], draw it.

cards.name: Xandar is Invincible
abilities: If there are no Villains in the city, you get +1[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Prison Riot
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Violence]: You get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Remove his Spine
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Violence]: Reveal the top card of your deck. You may KO it.

cards.name: Also Illegal
abilities: [hc:instinct]: You get +1[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Revenge for my Family
abilities: Double the [icon:attack] you have.
[keyword:Excessive Violence]: You may KO a Villain from your Victory Pile to do its Fight effect.

cards.name: Empathic Bond
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Kindness]: Put the hero you recruited this way on top of your deck.

cards.name: Selfless
abilities: [hc:instinct]: Draw a card.
Another player draws a card.

cards.name: Selfish
abilities: [hc:ranged]: Draw a card.
Another player discards a card.

cards.name: Inspire Courage
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Kindness]: You get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Sleep
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Kindness]: You may KO one of your cards.

cards.name: Emotional Wave
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Kindness]: you get +[icon:attack] equal to total of all printed [icon:recruit] and [icon:attack] of the Hero you recruited this way.

cards.name: Discover the Dead
abilities: [keyword:Excessive Kindness]: you get +[icon:attack] equal to the cost of the Hero you recruited this way.

cards.name: Ronan the Accuser
abilities: Always Leads: Followers of Ronan

Master Strike: Each player discards a card at random. Ronan captures this Strike as a “Necrocraft Ship“ [keyword:Villainous Weapon] that gives +1[icon:attack]. When you gain a Necrocraft Ship, it becomes a [keyword:Triggered Artifact] that says “Whenever a Master Strike is completed, draw a card.“

cards.name: Epic Ronan the Accuser
abilities: Always Leads: Followers of Ronan

Master Strike: Each player with six or more cards in hand discards two cards at random. Ronan captures this Strike as a “Necrocraft Ship“ [keyword:Villainous Weapon] that gives +2[icon:attack]. When you gain a Necrocraft Ship, it becomes a [keyword:Triggered Artifact] that says “Whenever a Master Strike is completed, draw a card.“

cards.name: Ronan's Throne
abilities: Fight: KO one of your Heroes. Rescue 2 Bystanders. Ronan captures this card as a [keyword:Villainous Weapon].
[keyword:Triggered Artifact] — Whenever a Scheme Twist is completed, draw two cards.

cards.name: Hood of the Accuser
abilities: Fight: KO one of your Heroes. Rescue 2 Bystanders. Ronan captures this card as a [keyword:Villainous Weapon].
[keyword:Triggered Artifact] — Whenever a Master Strike is completed, you may KO one of your cards.

cards.name: Ancient Kree Armor
abilities: Fight: KO one of your Heroes. Rescue 2 Bystanders. Ronan captures this card as a [keyword:Villainous Weapon].
[keyword:Triggered Artifact] — Whenever you gain your first Wound in any turn, you may KO it.

cards.name: The Cosmi-Rod Warhammer
abilities: Fight: KO one of your Heroes. Rescue 2 Bystanders. Ronan captures this card as a [keyword:Villainous Weapon].
[keyword:Triggered Artifact] — Whenever you recruit a Hero from the HQ, you get +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Ego, the Living Planet
abilities: Ego gets +1[icon:attack] for each city space. When there are no more city spaces, Good Wins.
Always Leads: Any Villain Group, plus add an additional Villain Group (even for 1 player).
Master Strike: Create an extra city space on the left side of the city. If there are at least 3 Villains in the city, each player gains a Wound. Play another card from the Villain Deck.

cards.name: Epic Ego, the Living Planet
abilities: Ego gets +2[icon:attack] for each city space. When there are no more city spaces, Good Wins.
Always Leads: Any Villain Group, plus add two additional Villain Groups (even for 1 player).
Master Strike: This Strike becomes an extra city space to the left side of the city. If there are at least 2 Villains in the city, each player gains a Wound. Play two cards from the Villain Deck.

cards.name: I'm a Celestial, Sweetheart
abilities: Fight: When you draw a new hand of cards at the end of this turn, draw two extra cards.
Destroy the leftmost city space. Any Villain there escapes. Shuffle this Tactic back into Ego's Tactics.

cards.name: Cover All That Exists
abilities: Fight: You may KO one of your Heroes. Choose a Henchman from any Victory Pile to enter the city.
Destroy the leftmost city space. Any Villain there escapes. Shuffle this Tactic back into Ego's Tactics.

cards.name: The Expansion is My Purpose
abilities: Fight: You get +1[icon:recruit] for each empty city space.
Destroy the leftmost city space. Any Villain there escapes. Shuffle this Tactic back into Ego's Tactics.

cards.name: Until Everything is... Me!
abilities: Fight: Rescue three Bystanders.
Destroy the leftmost city space. Any Villain there escapes. Shuffle this Tactic back into Ego's Tactics.

cards.name: Exolon Attendants
abilities: Exolon Attendants gets +2[icon:attack] while another Villain is [keyword:Commanding] the Followers of Ronan.
Ambush: Reveal the top card of the Villain Deck. If it's a Villain, it enters an empty city space.

cards.name: Exolon Monks
abilities: Exolon Monks get +2[icon:attack] while another Villain is [keyword:Commanding] the Followers of Ronan.
Fight: KO one of your Heroes.

cards.name: Sakaaran Mercenaries
abilities: Sakaaran Mercenaries get +2[icon:attack] while another Villain is [keyword:Commanding] the Followers of Ronan.
Ambush: If another Villain is [keyword:Commanding] the Followers of Ronan, each player gains a Wound.

cards.name: Korath the Pursuer
abilities: Korath gets +2[icon:attack] while he [keyword:Commands] the Followers of Ronan.

Ambush: Each player may draw a card. For each player that did, reveal a card from the Villain Deck. Play a Followers of Ronan card from among the cards you revealed this way. Put the rest back in any order.
Fight: Same effect.

cards.name: Nebula
abilities: Nebula gets +2[icon:attack] while she [keyword:Commands] the Followers of Ronan.

Ambush: Nebula captures a [keyword:Villainous Weapon] from another Villain in the city or captures an [keyword:Artifact] from a player's control as a [keyword:Villainous Weapon]. If it doesn't already give a [keyword:Villainous Weapon] bonus, it gives +2[icon:attack].

cards.name: Korath's Disrupter Rifle
abilities: [keyword:Villainous Weapon]
Ambush: If Korath is in the city, he captures this.
[keyword:Triggered Artifact] — Whenever you play a card that costs 6 or more, you get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: “The Dark Aster“ Flagship
abilities: [keyword:Villainous Weapon]
Ambush: If a Follower of Ronan captures this, each player gains a Wound.
[keyword:Triggered Artifact] — Whenever you defeat a Villain, you get +1[icon:recruit].

cards.name: The Orb
abilities: [keyword:Villainous Weapon]
Ambush: Put all Heroes from the HQ on the bottom of the Hero Deck.

[keyword:Triggered Artifact] — When you fight the Mastermind, take another turn after this one. Don't play a card from the Villain Deck at the start of that turn. This ability can only be used once per game.

cards.name: Gef
abilities: Gef gets +2[icon:attack] while he [keyword:Commands] the Ravagers.
Ambush: Swap Gef with the leftmost Ravager in the city.
Fight: If Gef was [keyword:Commanding] the Ravagers, draw a card.

cards.name: Tullk
abilities: Tullk gets +2[icon:attack] while he [keyword:Commands] the Ravagers.
Ambush: Swap Tullk with the leftmost Ravager in the city.
Fight: If Tullk was [keyword:Commanding] the Ravagers, KO one of your Heroes.

cards.name: Kraglin Obfonteri
abilities: Kraglin gets +2[icon:attack] while he [keyword:Commands] the Ravagers.
Ambush: Swap Kraglin with the leftmost Ravager in the city.
Fight: If Kraglin was [keyword:Commanding] the Ravagers, draw two cards.

cards.name: Taserface
abilities: Taserface gets +2[icon:attack] while he [keyword:Commands] the Ravagers.
Ambush: Swap Taserface with the leftmost Ravager in the city.
Fight: If Taserface was [keyword:Commanding] the Ravagers, you get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Yondu Udonta
abilities: Yondu gets +2[icon:attack] while he [keyword:Commands] the Ravagers.
Ambush: Swap Yondu with the leftmost Ravager in the city.
Fight: If Yondu was [keyword:Commanding] the Ravagers, KO up to two of your Heroes.

cards.name: Scavenged Blade
abilities: [keyword:Villainous Weapon]
Ambush: Play another card from the Villain Deck.
[keyword:Triggered Artifact] — When you play a [hc:strength] or [hc:instinct] card, you may get +2[icon:attack]. If you do, shuffle this into the Villain Deck.

cards.name: Ravager Starship “Eclector“
abilities: [keyword:Villainous Weapon]
Ambush: If a Ravager captures this, that Ravager swaps spaces with the leftmost Ravager in the city.
[keyword:Triggered Artifact] — Whenever you play a [hc:tech] card, you get +1[icon:attack].

cards.name: Yaka Arrow
abilities: [keyword:Villainous Weapon]
Ambush: If Yondu is in the city, he captures this. If he is in any player's Victory Pile, he enters an empty city space, then captures this.
[keyword:Triggered Artifact] — Whenever you play a [hc:covert] or [hc:ranged] card, you get +1[icon:attack].
Setup: 8 Twists. Add an extra Villain Group.
Special Rules: Heroes that start in or enter the HQ are “Imprisoned“ face down, can't be recruited, and cost 0. You can spend 1[icon:attack] each to flip them face up.
Twist: Spend this amount this turn “for the escape plan“ or else after you draw your new hand, gain a Wound then Imprison and mix up all Heroes in the HQ.
Twist 1-3: 3[icon:attack] (Quarnyx Battery)
Twist 4-5: 5[icon:attack] (Prison Control Device)
Twist 6: 6[icon:recruit] (That Guy's Leg)
Twist 7: 7[icon:attack] (Cassette Player)
Twist 8: Evil wins!
Setup: 11 Twists. Add an extra Villain Group.

Twist: This Twist enters the city as a 2[icon:attack] “Sovereign Omnicraft“ Villain worth 1VP with “Fight: You get +1[icon:recruit].“ Each player shuffles all Twists from their Victory Piles back into the Villain Deck. Play another card from the Villain Deck.
Evil Wins: When 3 Omnicraft escape.

Setup: 7 Twists. Use 7 Heroes including at least one [team:guardians-of-the-galaxy] Hero. Use double the normal number of Villain and Henchman Groups, but use only half the cards from each of those groups, randomly & secretly. (1 player: 2 Henchmen per group)
Twist: KO all the Heroes from HQ. Villains in the Sewers and Bridge swap spaces. Likewise Villains in the Bank and Streets.
Evil Wins: When there are 32 non-grey Heroes in the KO pile.
Setup: 9 Twists.

Twist 1-8: : Put this Twist next the the Scheme as an “Abilisk Tentacle“ Villain worth 4VP. It captures a non-grey Hero from your discard pile. Its [icon:attack] is 3 + the cost of that Hero. It has “Fight: KO one of your grey Heroes. A player of your choice gains the captured Hero.“ 2+ players: The player on your right plays a Tentacle from their Victory Pile, capturing from them.
Twist 9: Replay all defeated Tentacles.
Evil Wins: When there are 5 Tentacles.
